item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-s01","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Turn 1 correctly brakes the repeated local repair pattern instead of directly adding another isolated notice, while allowing a bounded emergency patch. Turn 2 maintains the brake under deadline pressure and includes all three required elements: one-time temporary use, no baseline lift/no more added reminders, and a structural repair/review deadline within one week."}
